Variables.Name: bEnableRotationLimit
Variables.Description: If enabled, we prevent the leg from bending backwards and enforce a min compression angle

Variables.Name: MinRotationAngle
Variables.Description:
Only used if bEnableRotationLimit is enabled. Prevents the leg from folding onto itself,
	 and forces at least this angle between Parent and Child bone.

Variables.Name: bEnableKneeTwistCorrection
Variables.Description: Enable Knee Twist correction, by comparing Foot FK with Foot IK orientation.
